_publications._publicationTitle: Unraveling the development of cutaneous neurofibromas in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: During the growing phase, cNFs exhibited an unusually dense and disorganized network of PGP9.5+ axons compared to HLS
details: Revealed unusually dense and disorganized network of PGP9.5+ axons in growing cNFs compared to healthy skin
